title: SaplingIvkDecryptor reconstructs Fr scalar on every note trial — O(n*m) cost
description: scanner.rs SaplingIvkDecryptor::try_decrypt_sapling calls jubjub::Fr::from_repr(*self.ivk_bytes) on every single output in every block. This is O(n_blocks * n_outputs_per_block) field-element reconstructions of the same static value. The Fr scalar from ivk_bytes never changes — it could be validated once in new() and stored as jubjub::Fr directly. Zeroizing<Fr> exists in the zeroize ecosystem. At mainnet scale (~1000+ outputs per block) this is unnecessary CPU work on every scan cycle.
